voice.latency_note: Measured via Vapi dashboard timestamps: STT 280ms + LLM first token 520ms + TTS 190ms + network 210ms = 1.2s avg

chat.note: Hallucinations are on truly out-of-scope questions (GPA, car, food, Twitter). All factual questions about projects and background answered correctly.

retrieval.note: Measured on Railway deployment where all 7 repos are indexed. Local chroma_db has only 4 repos — meta-hackathon-incident-commander and HotelBookingPro missing locally.
